---
title: "main"
author: "Caroline Lebrun-Sabalot, Pierre Ripoll, Matéo Garbe"
server: shiny
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
execute: 
    echo: false
---


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

packages <- c("dplyr", "ggplot2", "reticulate", "rdrobust","dotenv","plotly","shiny", "dotenv")

# Installer seulement ceux qui ne sont pas déjà installés
install_if_missing <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg)
  }
}

lapply(packages, install_if_missing)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
library(dotenv)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reticulate)
library(dotenv)
library(plotly)
library(shiny)
```




```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| context: setup

# Charger les fonctions
source("functions/main_functions.R")

#chargement des var d'env pour Caro
if (file.exists(".env")) {
  dotenv::load_dot_env(".env")
} 

# Télécharger le CSV
remote_path <- "RDD/df_RDD_main_BC_full.csv"
gdf_RDD<-get_s3_csv("mgarbe",remote_path)

```

# Balanced Checks 

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
#| context: data

#récupérer l'objet Python
seuil <- 8
gdf_RDD_seuil <- gdf_RDD %>% filter(abs(delta_score_1) < seuil)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false

# Variables BC
bc_vars <- grep("^BC_", names(gdf_RDD_seuil), value = TRUE)
tab_names <- c("Population", "Densité de population", "Chômage", "Emploi")
stopifnot(length(bc_vars) == length(tab_names))

for (i in seq_along(bc_vars)) {
  # Titre de l'onglet
  cat(paste0("## ", tab_names[i], "\n\n"))
  p <- plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var = bc_vars[i])
  print(p)
  cat("\n\n")
}

```

:::

# Régressions

```{r}
#| panel: sidebar
kernels <- c("uni", "tri")
variables <- c("surface_creee")
effets_fixes_interco <- c("Nuance_interco", "aucun")
radioButtons("k", "Choix du kernel", choices = kernels, selected = kernels[[1]], inline = TRUE)
radioButtons("var", "Choix de la variable", choices = variables, selected = variables[[1]], inline = TRUE)
radioButtons("var_ef", "Effet fixe pour la couleur de l'interco", choices = effets_fixes_interco,
selected = effets_fixes_interco[[1]],inline = TRUE)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Plot
```{r}
#| panel: fill
plotOutput("plot_rdd")
```


## Table

```{r}
#| panel: fill
verbatimTextOutput("rdd_result")
```

:::

```{r}
#| context: server

#table
rdd_res <- reactive({
  compute_rdd(
    gdf_RDD_seuil,
    outcome_var = input$var,
    kernel_choisi = input$k,
    cov_choisies = input$var_ef,
    election_choisie = "2014_muni"
  )
})

output$rdd_result <- renderPrint({
  res <- rdd_res()
  cat("Estimate :", res$Estimate, "\n")
  cat("p-value :", res$pv, "\n")
})

#plot
p<- reactive({
  plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, 
  outcome_var = input$var)
})

output$plot_rdd <- renderPlot({p()})

```



::: {.panel-tabset}

## Avec kernel uniforme
```{r}
#| echo: false
rdd_unif = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "uni",
                        election = "2020_muni")
rdd_unif$Estimate
rdd_unif$pv
```


## Avec kernel triangulaire
```{r}
#| echo: false
rdd_tri = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "tri",
                        election_choisie = "2014_muni")
print(rdd_tri)
rdd_tri$Estimate
rdd_tri$pv
```


## Avec kernel uniforme
```{r}
#| echo: false
rdd_unif = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "uni",
                        election_choisie = "2014_muni")
rdd_unif$Estimate
rdd_unif$pv
```

:::
